problem_statement: Teams building voice copilots in Azure AI Foundry need a quick way to validate speech in and speech out using the same Foundry-backed AI Services account.
hypothesis: An Azure AI Services account (kind: AIServices) with project management enabled can host a Foundry project and successfully run Speech SDK text-to-speech and speech-to-text roundtrips using generated deployment outputs.
customer_scenario: Platform and app teams validating low-friction voice capability for Foundry-based assistants before building full conversational orchestration.
data_requirements: No production data. Uses synthetic text prompts and generated WAV output only.
security_notes: Prototype only. Uses a function key for the HTTP trigger and managed identity / AAD for Speech SDK calls. Do not commit env/.env, keys, or recorded/generated audio containing sensitive content.
